sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104553" key="trapezo/koros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰπεζό-κορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κορέννυμι</foreign>) <sense id="n104553.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filling oneself at another's table,</tr_> or (from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κορέω</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweeping the table,</tr_> epith. of parasites, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
